← Back to In Memoriam

Aleksandar Ivić

University of Belgrade (RS) · 1949-2020

A foundational figure in additive number theory whose career predates the arXiv and OpenAlex digital record this directory is built from. Listed here so the lineage behind the modern field stays visible.

HomepageNot available
Google ScholarSearch results
Born1949
InstitutionUniversity of Belgrade
CountryRS
Active years2003 to 2018
h-index21 (OpenAlex)
StatusFoundational figure (1949-2020)

zbMATHAuthor page
Also ranked inNot in current rankings

Also ranked in: wwilp #184, wwileg #9, wwitp #16

Mathematics Genealogy: View advisor-student lineage

Leading analyst on the Riemann zeta function; his book The Riemann Zeta-Function (1985) remains a standard reference

Spotted an error or an omission? Email admin@wwirh.org.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwirh.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.
